mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, body, user_id, article_id, created_at) VALUES ( #{comment.id}, #{comment.body}, #{comment.userId}, #{comment.articleId}, #{comment.createdAt, typeHandler=io.spring.article.config.DateTimeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, body, user_id, article_id, created_at FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
